description: Part C two-step destructure — handler awaits params into intermediate const `p`, then destructures slug from p. Exercises AST walker's transitive-binding resolution: slug's VariableDeclaration traces through p's VariableDeclaration back to `await params`. Today emits service_role + .from() (slug not in TENANT_DISCRIMINANTS). Must NOT emit after Part C: binding-origin tracking recognises slug as URL-param via transitive chain.
